CVE-2016-9427.title: Integer overflow vulnerability in bdwgc before 2016-09-27 allows  ...
CVE-2016-9427.description: Integer overflow vulnerability in bdwgc before 2016-09-27 allows attackers to cause client of bdwgc denial of service (heap buffer overflow crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code via huge allocation.
